description: Cloudera Data Platform — primary Hadoop data lake cluster (12-node) holding 5 years of manufacturing batch records, sensor telemetry, QC results and production metrics
Cloudera Data Platform — secondary Hadoop data lake cluster (8-node) providing high availability and data replication for the primary lake
Cloudera Edge node — gateway server managing data ingestion pipelines from manufacturing floor systems into the Hadoop data lake
Apache Knox gateway providing perimeter security and REST API access control for the Hadoop data lake cluster
NetApp AFF A400 storage array providing NFS backing store for Hadoop NameNode metadata and HDFS persistent volumes
Apache Spark on YARN cluster for large-scale batch analytics and machine learning over manufacturing data lake content
Apache Kafka cluster (3-broker) for real-time streaming of shop-floor sensor data and MES events into the data lake
Apache Hive metastore and query engine providing SQL access to manufacturing data lake tables for reporting and analytics teams
SAP S/4HANA ERP — finance, procurement, inventory management, production planning and cost accounting for the Austin plant
SAP HANA in-memory database appliance providing the persistence layer for the Austin SAP S/4HANA ERP instance
Order management system (Oracle Order Management Cloud) handling customer order entry, fulfilment workflow and order status tracking
Warehouse management system (Manhattan Associates WMS) managing inbound receipts, put-away, pick, pack and despatch of finished pharmaceutical goods
Transportation management system (Oracle TMS) for carrier selection, shipment planning and delivery tracking of outbound orders
Supplier relationship management portal (SAP Ariba) for purchase orders, supplier onboarding, contract management and supplier performance scoring
EDI gateway (OpenText Trading Grid) for automated B2B document exchange — purchase orders, ASNs and invoices — with suppliers and 3PL partners
Salesforce Sales Cloud CRM managing pharmaceutical distributor and hospital key accounts, opportunity pipeline and order forecasting for the US region
Salesforce Marketing Cloud for campaign management, email marketing and HCP engagement tracking across the US market
ServiceNow Customer Service Management for post-sale customer support, product complaint intake and field corrective action tracking
Workday Human Capital Management for employee records, benefits, payroll, performance reviews and recruitment for the Austin plant workforce
Cornerstone OnDemand learning management system for GMP training compliance, role-based curricula and training record management
UKG Dimensions time and attendance system integrated with shift scheduling, overtime management and Austin plant payroll
Siemens Opcenter MES managing electronic batch records, production orders, in-process sampling and shop-floor genealogy for the Austin manufacturing lines
Rockwell Automation FactoryTalk SCADA system for real-time monitoring and control of bioreactors, filling lines and environmental systems on the Austin manufacturing floor
LabWare Enterprise LIMS for sample lifecycle management, analytical instrument integration, test result entry and CoA generation in the Austin QC laboratory
Veeva Vault QMS for deviation management, CAPA tracking, change control, supplier quality and document control in support of FDA 21 CFR Part 211 compliance
Veeva Vault ManualsVault electronic batch record system providing paperless batch review and release workflow integrated with the Austin MES
Waters Empower 3 chromatography data system managing HPLC and UPLC analytical instrument data for raw material and finished product QC testing
Honeywell Building Manager environmental monitoring system for cleanroom temperature, humidity, differential pressure and particle count continuous monitoring
IBM Maximo Asset Management CMMS for preventive maintenance scheduling, calibration records, equipment qualification status and work order management
Trackwise Digital regulatory affairs system for FDA inspection readiness, regulatory commitment tracking and field action management
Microsoft Active Directory domain controller providing identity, authentication and group policy management for all Austin plant on-premises systems
Microsoft Entra ID (Azure Active Directory) tenant providing SSO, MFA and conditional access for cloud and SaaS applications used at the Austin plant
Microsoft 365 tenant providing Exchange Online email, Teams collaboration, SharePoint document management and OneDrive file storage for Austin plant staff
ServiceNow IT Service Management for helpdesk ticketing, incident management, change advisory board workflow and asset inventory for Austin IT
VMware vSphere 8 virtualisation platform (4-host cluster) hosting all Austin on-premises application workloads and databases
Veeam Backup & Replication 12 providing daily backup and off-site replication of all Austin on-premises virtual machines and NAS data
Palo Alto Networks PA-5250 next-generation firewall providing perimeter security, IPS and URL filtering for the Austin plant network
Splunk Enterprise SIEM aggregating security logs from all Austin systems for threat detection, compliance reporting and forensic investigation
Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention enforcing data classification policies and preventing exfiltration of sensitive manufacturing and patient data
Cisco Catalyst 9000 series switching and Cisco Meraki Wi-Fi infrastructure providing segmented OT and IT network connectivity across the Austin plant campus
Microsoft Power BI Premium capacity connected to SAP ERP, data lake Hive tables and MES for manufacturing KPI dashboards and executive reporting
Informatica Intelligent Data Management Cloud — ETL and data integration pipelines moving data between ERP, MES, LIMS, WMS and the Hadoop data lake
Informatica MDM — master data management hub for product, supplier, customer and employee golden records shared across Austin plant systems
Esri ArcGIS Enterprise for spatial mapping of supply chain routes, distribution network and cold-chain logistics across the US market
SAP EAM (Extended Warehouse and Asset Management) module integrated with the Austin SAP S/4HANA instance for plant maintenance and capital asset tracking
